acts.label: STRANGERS TO SOUL
acts.why: Culminates the 'broken shine' and collective trance moment where pain transforms into moti

acts.label: THE EXPLOSIVE DROP
acts.why: Captures the intensity peak of 1.0 at the main drop with maximum kinetic energy and rhythm

acts.label: FINAL EUPHORIA
acts.why: Secures the lingering high of the 'alive' chorus before the final fade-out at 292s.
